title: Korbond Black and White Sewing Thread Set - 320m Polyester Spool - Crafting, Sewing, Hand and Machine
features: LARGE PACK: This set contains a total of 320m of Professional Thread (2 x 160m Spools)

POLYESTER MATERIAL: Korbond Polyester Thread is designed for heavy duty use, it has a lot of give while retaining its shape and has excellent colour fastness, retaining its bright colour through more washes than cotton alternatives.
LOW FRICTION: The Korbond Professional Thread Selection are specially wound onto a spindle in production to reduce needle friction and deterioration when sewing.
MULTI USE: Suitable for both hand and machine sewing, the abrasion resistant thread creates strong seams.
CHOOSE FROM 14 COLOURS: Select the perfect shade for your project from Korbond’s range of 14 threads, including bright and bold colours in addition to pastel hues and muted tones.
description: The Korbond range of Polyester Threads, available in a range of 14 vibrant colour choices, meaning you can find a perfect match for any fabric, project, or style you are working with. The range includes both metallic and matte options, meaning they can be used for impactful embellishments or as a perfectly colour matched functional thread. Korbond threads provide ‘no shrinkage’ and excellent colour fastness which cannot be beaten, so are ideal for constructing garments which will be laundered regularly, such as general sewing on school wear and work wear. The polyester coated core ensures a strong and consistent performance for a wide range of sewing applications, suitable for both hand and machine sewing, smooth and fur free to allow the thread to glide smoothly through fabric.
